g.text: vinary-viewer state model — DataScript :doc entity (SSOT) + app-db (ephemeral UI)
linked by the amber :ds/rev bridge field
«schema-less» = a plain scalar attribute that needs
NO schema entry. DataScript requires schema only for
THE BRIDGE (amber): the two stores are kept in lock-step by one
field. Every DataScript transaction fires the conn listener, which
and :doc/active declare :<- [:ds/rev], so they recompute per tx.
re-posh is a declared dependency but UNUSED — this hand-rolled
«schema-less» needs no schema · «unique» = identity key · «now available» = available
